content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Dendra Dengler 
419 Beach Drive 
Arcata, California 95521 
October 25, 2011 
RE: Your Request for Informal Assistance 
Our File No. W-11-123 
Dear Ms. Dengler: 
This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission 
has withdrawn your request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. 1 As we 
discussed in a telephone conversation, all of your questions had been answered by a prior advice 
letter and that if you had other questions you would contact us. We have not received any 
further correspondence from you with regards to this matter. Consequently, your request is 
withdrawn 
If, in the future, you should determine that you have a question about how to comply with 
a specific provision of the Act, please contact us for further advice. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact us at (916) 322-5660. 
By: 
SB:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
Sukhi Brar 
Counsel, Legal Divisio·,1 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory 
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices 
Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All 
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.question_synthetic: The document does not contain a specific legal question as it addresses the withdrawal of a prior advice request rather than answering a new question.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC has withdrawn the requestor's advice request because all questions had been previously answered in a prior advice letter and no further correspondence was received.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms prior advice letter addressed all questions and request is now withdrawn due to no further correspondence.

embedding.summary: This is a withdrawal letter from the FPPC confirming that Dendra Dengler's request for informal advice has been withdrawn, as all her questions were already answered in a prior advice letter and no new questions were submitted.
